library_preparation_preflight.summary: The artifact resolves with its required Maven dependencies transitively, and meaningful tests can be written against command-line construction and output consumers without extra Maven dependencies, Docker services, or mandatory environment/system properties.
risks: The provider is the Git executable implementation and normally shells out to `git`; if tests choose real command execution instead of command construction/consumer coverage, they should use a temporary local repository and configure Git identity locally in that repo. Ubuntu CI normally already has `git` available, so no deterministic setup is justified.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8354 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven.scm:maven-scm-provider-gitexe:2.2.1; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015
